citations.narrative:
There was an excessive amount of urine-soaked wooden shavings, hair, and particulate debris noted on the front corner
of the door and on the front edge of the floor of 5 male rabbit enclosures compared to the other enclosures located in the
same room. There was also a noticeable urine odor noted when standing in front of these enclosures.
Per this Section, primary enclosures for rabbits shall be kept reasonably free of excreta, hair, and other debris by periodic
cleaning of the enclosures. Although the rabbit enclosures are changed every two weeks and the pans are scraped three
times a week, these 5 enclosures had a build-up of urine-soaked shavings, hair, and particulate debris. The Licensee
needs to spot-clean/clean any enclosures with an excessive build-up of soiled shavings, hair, or debris on a more
frequent basis for the health of the animals and to minimize urine odor. Correct by 2/20/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
3.56(a)(1) 
   
Sanitation. 
There was an excessive amount of urine-soaked wooden shavings, hair, and particulate debris noted on the front corner 
of the door and on the front edge of the floor of 5 male rabbit enclosures compared to the other enclosures located in the 
same room. There was also a noticeable urine odor noted when standing in front of these enclosures. 
 
Per this Section, primary enclosures for rabbits shall be kept reasonably free of excreta, hair, and other debris by periodic 
cleaning of the enclosures. Although the rabbit enclosures are changed every two weeks and the pans are scraped three 
times a week, these 5 enclosures had a build-up of urine-soaked shavings, hair, and particulate debris. The Licensee 
needs to spot-clean/clean any enclosures with an excessive build-up of soiled shavings, hair, or debris on a more 
frequent basis for the health of the animals and to minimize urine odor. Correct by 2/20/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.  
 
*END OF REPORT*
